2606.08184.title: TextEconomizer: Enhancing Lossy Text Compression with Denoising Transformers and Entropy Coding
2606.08184.paper_summary: Lossy text compression reduces data size while preserving core meaning, making it well-suited for summarization, automated analysis, and digital archives. Despite the dominance of transformer-based models in language modeling, integrating context vectors and entropy coding into Sequence-to-Sequence (Seq2Seq) generation remains underexplored. A key challenge lies in identifying the most informative context vectors from encoder output and incorporating entropy coding to enhance storage efficiency while maintaining high-quality outputs, even under noisy text. We introduce TextEconomizer, an encoder-decoder framework paired with a transformer neural network that reduces variable-sized inputs by 50% to 80% without prior knowledge of dataset dimensions. Our model achieves competitive compression ratios via entropy coding while delivering near-perfect text quality, assessed by BLEU, ROUGE, METEOR, and semantic similarity scores. TextEconomizer operates with approximately 153x fewer parameters than comparable models, achieving a 5.39x compression ratio without sacrificing semantic quality. We also evaluate an LSTM-based autoencoder achieving a state-of-the-art 67x compression ratio with 196x fewer parameters, and LLaMAFormer, a modified transformer with 263x fewer parameters than ICAE while maintaining competitive text quality. TextEconomizer significantly surpasses existing transformer-based models in balancing memory efficiency and high-fidelity outputs, marking a breakthrough in lossy compression with optimal space utilization.
2606.08184.paper_summary_zh: 有損文本壓縮在保留核心意義的同時減少數據大小，使其非常適合用於摘要、自動分析和數字檔案。儘管基於Transformer的模型在語言建模中佔主導地位，但將上下文向量和熵編碼整合到序列到序列（Seq2Seq）生成中仍然未被充分探索。一個主要挑戰在於從編碼器輸出中識別出最具信息量的上下文向量，並納入熵編碼以提高存儲效率，同時在嘈雜文本下保持高質量的輸出。我們介紹了TextEconomizer，一個與Transformer神經網絡配對的編碼器-解碼器框架，能在不事先了解數據集維度的情況下將可變大小的輸入減少50%到80%。我們的模型通過熵編碼實現了具有競爭力的壓縮比，同時提供接近完美的文本質量，通過BLEU、ROUGE、METEOR和語義相似性分數進行評估。TextEconomizer的參數約比可比較的模型少153倍，實現了5.39倍的壓縮比而不犧牲語義質量。我們還評估了一個基於LSTM的自編碼器，實現了67倍的最先進壓縮比，參數少196倍，以及LLaMAFormer，一個修改過的Transformer，其參數比ICAE少263倍，同時保持競爭力的文本質量。TextEconomizer在平衡內存效率和高保真輸出方面顯著超越現有的基於Transformer的模型，標誌著有損壓縮在最佳空間利用方面的突破。
2606.08184.author: Mahbub E Sobhani et.al.
2606.08184.authors: Mahbub E Sobhani, Anika Tasnim Rodela, Chowdhury Mofizur Rahman, Dewan Md. Farid, Swakkhar Shatabda
